function getInfo() external view returns (uint256[129] memory prices, uint64[129] memory taoInPool, bool[129] memory staked, uint256[129] memory stakedPrices)

function getInfoV3() external view returns (uint256[129] memory prices, uint64[129] memory taoInPool, bool[129] memory stakedv2, bool[129] memory stakedv3, uint256[129] memory stakedPricesv2, uint256[129] memory stakedPricesv3)
function getStakedPrices() external view returns (uint256[129] memory)
function getStakedAmount(bytes32 validatorColdkey) external view returns (uint256[129] memory amount)
